name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Delivering large-scale telecommunications and major infrastructure projects within Tier-1 environments.

heroTitle: Specializing in 5G network upgrades, land access coordination, and structural delivery.
heroSubtitle: Proven expertise in managing complex stakeholder environments, statutory approvals, and end-to-end commercial execution across Telecom and Heavy Civil sectors.

aboutLead: Strategy-driven engineer balancing technical oversight with commercial discipline.
aboutStory: Based in Melbourne, I lead major telecommunications upgrades and civil infrastructure packages. I bridge the gap between structural engineering theory and site execution, specializing in 5G infrastructure, statutory approvals, and strict conformance reporting.

tools: Management: MS Project, P6, Procore, InEight
Analysis: SpaceGass, Microstran, RAPT, MS Tower
